historical_period_text: Unless mentioned otherwise, all information is requested for fiscal years 2023, 2024, and YTD Mar-26, plus the corresponding YTD Mar-25 period.

items.request_text: Annual financial statements - Please provide audited, reviewed, or compiled financial statements for the historical periods available.
Monthly trial balances - Please provide monthly trial balances for the historical periods at the most granular level available.
items.kpmg_comment: Please reconcile these TBs to the audit or provide a bridge.

items.request_text: Accounts receivable aging - Please provide AR aging at the last two fiscal year ends and the latest period available.
Purchase journal - Please provide a detailed purchase journal to the extent not included in the transaction data.
Commitments and contingencies - Please provide details for commitments, contingencies, off balance sheet items, and restricted cash as of the latest month available.
